scripts.build:frontend: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build:api && npm run build:frontend && npm run verify:frontend-assets && npm run verify:critical-routes && npm run verify:document-schema && npm run verify:salary-schema && npm run verify:approval-schema && npm run verify:compensation-schema && npm run verify:payroll-schema && npm run verify:payslip-schema && npm run verify:employee-lifecycle-schema && npm run verify:offboarding-schema && npm run verify:contract-schema
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler deploy && npm run smoke:production
scripts.db:execute:local: wrangler d1 execute DB --local --command "SELECT 1 AS ok;"
scripts.db:execute:remote: wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --command "SELECT 1 AS ok;"
